2198990.name: Our Test Game
2198990.description:
Thief of Smiles is an exciting 2D physics puzzle game with stealth elements. Move lamps, fling barrels, tie up enemies and swing through levels. But be sure to stay hidden in the shadows. All you need for this is your chewing gum companion Ponti. Use it to uncover the dark secrets of the Smiles Savings Bank!



Beware, the evil bankers are out to stop your efforts to uncover their secrets. To outsmart their watchful gaze, you'll have to remain hidden in the shadows. But fear not! With your trusty telepathic chewing gum, you can remove any obstacles in your way. Just throw both ends of Ponti and watch him yank that obstructive lamp out of sight.



Get ready to embark on a thrilling puzzle-solving adventure with Ponti by your side! This clever little creature is the key to unlocking the most intricate and challenging puzzles. His flexible body can wrap around any object, giving you the extra reach you need to manipulate your environment in ways you never thought possible. No puzzle is too tricky for Ponti to handle. He'll help you open trapdoors, and even disarm dangerous lasers with ease.



With the ability to stick to literally anything, Ponti is your secret weapon to navigate through the game's dangerous environments. Climb above your enemies' heads and evade their tireless gaze. Or why not take a break from your stealthy tactics by sticking your foes to the ceiling? The possibilities are endless. How will you outsmart the Smiles Savings Bank?

So get ready to embark on a thrilling and exciting adventure with Thief of Smiles. Ponti is waiting for you, and the banks secrets are ready to be uncovered. The only question is, are you up to the challenge?
2198990.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
